message:
feat: add JsRunner (Tier 2) — execute JS/TS in-DO without Container

JsRunner runs JavaScript and TypeScript directly in the Workers V8
isolate, eliminating the need for a Container for Node.js workloads.

- New JsRunner module with CJS module system, require(), module
  resolution (extensions, index files, node_modules walk-up)
- Built-in modules: fs (sync via SQLite, async via R2), path,
  child_process, os, util, events, stream, assert, crypto, buffer,
  querystring, url
- Lightweight TypeScript type stripping (annotations, interfaces,
  type aliases, as-casts)
- Pre-loads dependency tree into SQLite cache so synchronous
  require() works for nested modules and JSON files
- ProcessManager Tier 2 dispatch: node script.js, node -e, node -p,
  direct ./script.js execution
- UnsafeEval binding support for production Workers
- 12 new tests covering all JsRunner functionality
- Removed debug endpoint /debug/eval-check
